description_long: This lantern features a tall, cylindrical body with a robust, dark metallic frame and vertical support columns. The central section is encased in a transparent or semi-transparent material, likely glass or acrylic, allowing the internal light source to emit a cool blue glow. The top is adorned with two prominent, pointed finials, giving it a slightly futuristic or industrial appearance. The base is wide and circular, providing stability and suggesting it is designed to be post-mounted or placed on a flat surface. Subtle blue accent rings and illuminated segments are visible at both the top and bottom, enhancing its modern aesthetic. The overall design is sleek, functional, and suited for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas.
description: A tall, cylindrical lantern with a dark metallic frame, blue illuminated accents, and pointed finials, set on a wide circular base. Its modern, industrial design features a transparent central section for light emission.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical body, blue accent rings, and two pointed finials on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the transparent central section and the vertical support columns, with the base and finials visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the illuminated blue accents and finials clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the transparent central section and structural columns, with the base and finials in view.
